title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Tama, Unknown person #1, Marco, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Careful, carrot, the sky suddenly got clear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't want to accident- ally turn belong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just like what happened in the journal....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell's going on up there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was naive to think I could guard myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Give that sniveling snake a hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You still haven't gotten a grip, Momo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold your insolent tongue!! I know what I have to do,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it is not that simple to change oneself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got your back!! Sorry we got split up earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where do you think you're going?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Lend me your strength, Kim'emon, Kiku!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
